_comment: OTel Demo Phase 2 pilot run plan. Exercises every fault primitive at least once across 9 scenarios. Used for the go/no-go decision before full GCP collection. Per docs5/01 §8 Phase 2.

scenarios.purpose: ScaleDeployment on valkey-cart (cart-redis family transfers from OB)
Flagd primitive — adHighCpu (resource saturation, no OB analogue)
RestartPods primitive (existing OB path) for transient noise class
NEW family: Kafka broker outage (architectural-distance evidence)
NEW family: Kafka consumer lag via flagd
NEW service: LLM rate-limit (no OB analogue)
L3 cascade — CRITICAL validation: secondary must emerge observably per docs5/00 §5.5.7

go_no_go_checklist: All 11 pilot scenarios complete without harness errors
Each scenario produces telemetry windows in /data/runs/<run-id>/
build_triage_dataset.py emits 94 triage_feature_* columns per window
L3 cascade scenario shows observable secondary failure via trace propagation (docs5/00 §5.5.7)
OB regression check still passes: python -m v2_advanced.tch.check_cascade --cascade-dir .../v2g-final-models/final
